## TabCreator type

Write the specified tab to the output. Should return a layoutable control that can draw the widgets to a specified area.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type TabCreator = (parent: ParentWindow, output: WindowTabDesc) => TabLayoutable;
```
**References:** [TabLayoutable](./openrct2-flexui.tablayoutable.md)
